**[[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]]<ref name="Guide">''[[Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic]]'' states that all [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] were part of the [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]].</ref>

The '''Ord Cestus Squad''' consisted of an [[Alpha-class Advanced Recon Commando|Alpha ARC trooper]] and four [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]], which included a communications expert ([[Seefor]]), a pilot ([[Xutoo]]), a logistics expert ([[Sirty]]), a physical training expert ([[Forry]]), and their leader, ([[Jangotat]]). They aided [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]] on their [[Mission to Ord Cestus|mission]] to stop the droid foundry on [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]].

==Behind the scenes==
This squad has never been officially named; the placeholder title is derived from the location of the squad's only known mission.
